title: rhegma #4485
definition:
1) that which has been broken or rent asunder
    1a) a fracture, breach, cleft
    1b) rent clothes
    1c) fall, ruin
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) that which has been broken or rent asunder
    1a) a fracture, breach, cleft
    1b) rent clothes
    1c) fall, ruin

    NASB:  a fracture, hence a ruin:
